'''Liriana''' was the leader of the [[Wyrd]], a group of [[Tarasin]] [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Witch/Legends|witches]]. She was the elder sister of [[Meirana]] and [[Dariana]].

{{Char-stub}}
